title: Null's Armory
description: An adventure-focused mod that adds a unique spin on endgame content.
body:
# Null's Armory - Weapons from another world
Add the void's influnce to the deeper levels of your world and uncover never before seen weapons from another time and place, plus 3 new armor sets with unique mechanics.

## Gear
Null's Armory adds weapons and armor from across the multiverse. They will all be paramount in your fight against Null. Additionally, three custom armor sets with a unique Shields mechanic will make you withstand even the toughest of blows.

### Orthos Prime
A masterpiece in craftsmanship, an ancient race designed the Orthos Prime to leave enemies bleeding from its attacks. It is particularly deadly against enemies weakened in this way.\
\
\
![An Orthos Prime in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ca254993b73de87d3deeccce8d31a07655b127.png)
### Crucible
Molded from the nightmares of demons, the Crucible grows from dangerous to deadly while in the Nether. Smite down hellish foes with ease.\
\
\
![Someone with the Trench Resonator armor set weilding the Cruicible.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08769ce4d92eaef5f280680d42dfc88c6e048904.png)
### True Knife
Pain begets pain. The higher your Level, the higher the Violence.\
\
\
![The True Knife mid swing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c139eca23bac7d01383347f507ef192c5f3104e4.png)
### Yoshimitsu's Banner
A banner specialized in stealing souls. Experience gained is multiplied and restores health.\
\
\
![Someone attacking with an offhand Yoshimitsu's Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a72c86407475a1be4cb2b32dec9232f039a7aa1b_0.webp)
### Hellkite Claws
Lifted from The Thousand Hands Guild, these claws boast an impressive attack speed and range. Weild one of these claws in each hand to engage in Dragon Fangs, a stance which sacrifices health for further lethality.\
\
\
![Someone in the SC-Scout armor set swinging with a Hellkite Claw.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f2dc32f21546b2cca38ebdd5694cfa2efc39d08.png)
### Shield Armors
The Trench Resonator for strength, the SC-Scout for agility, and the Starman for balance. The Void has given these armors the special ability to generate Shields to protect their wearer. Each armor set has different max shields, recharge time, recharge delay, and overflow. When your shields are broken, take cover and wait for your shields to replenish, as excess damage will increase the delay.\
\
\
![(From left to right) The SC-Scout, Starman, and Trench Resonator armor sets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc4812deda7cc1175d39cc5ba60d3b4e4b22793d.png)
## The End is the Beginning
Null's Armory is intended to be towards the end of vanilla progression, providing the overworld with its own exceedingly rare resource like anchient debris. Other adventure-style mods can be used to fill in the gaps.

Dig to the bottom of the world. Only at the bed on which this place rests does the Void leak in. Find the Ore. Craft the Ingots. The Void Compass will help you.

## Compatibility
Null's Armory is intended to be played alongside [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat/versions), and as such it is listed as a required mod. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api), and [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets/versions) are required by core functions of the mod.
